title: grastidium ochroleucum
intro: Grastidium ochroleucum, also known as Hoary Cudweed, is a small, annual herbaceous plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Grastidium ochroleucum include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Grastidium ochroleucum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
